name: Professor Lynn Welchman
title: Professor of Law with particular reference to the Middle East and North Africa
expertise_topics: including Beyond the Code: Muslim Family Law and the Shari`a Courts in the Palestinian West Bank (2000)
Women and Muslim Family Laws in Arab States (2007)
and Violence Against Women (2005). In 2022 her book Al-Haq: A Global History of the First Palestinian Human Rights Organization (Univ Califonria Press
2021) was a winner at the prestigious Palestine Book Awards
If you would like to hear more about how she thinks the story of her studies
you can watch her inaugural professorial lecture (2013)
entitled Human Rights and the Middle East: a thousand and one stories
research_interests: Prof Welchman has published widely; including Beyond the Code: Muslim Family Law and the Shari`a Courts in the Palestinian West Bank (2000); Women and Muslim Family Laws in Arab States (2007); and (co-edited with Sara Hossain) 'Honour': Crimes; Paradigms; and Violence Against Women (2005). In 2022 her book Al-Haq: A Global History of the First Palestinian Human Rights Organization (Univ Califonria Press; 2021) was a winner at the prestigious Palestine Book Awards; If you would like to hear more about how she thinks the story of her studies; activism; writing and teaching fit together; you can watch her inaugural professorial lecture (2013); entitled Human Rights and the Middle East: a thousand and one stories; starting with Palestine
